allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rows=data['schoolInfo'][1]['row']; [print\(r['ATPT_OFCDC_SC_CODE'], r['ATPT_OFCDC_SC_NM'], r['SCHUL_NM'], r['LCTN_SC_NM']\) for r in rows]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json data=json.load\(sys.stdin\) if 'schoolInfo' in data: rows=data['schoolInfo'][1]['row'] for r in rows: print\(json.dumps\(r, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\) print\('---'\) print\('Total:', data['schoolInfo'][0]['head'][0]['list_total_count']\) else: print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json data=json.load\(sys.stdin\) head = data['schoolInfo'][0]['head'] print\('Total Ulsan schools in NEIS:', head[0]['list_total_count']\) print\('Status:', head[1]['RESULT']['MESSAGE']\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Total Ulsan schools:', data['schoolInfo'][0]['head'][0]['list_total_count']\)")
